criteria.description: The runtime-state backfill is exposed through an invocable CLI with a write-free dry-run mode.
criteria.notes: Focused migration suite and dogfood corpus guard passed during closeout.

criteria.description: Backfill verification is fail-closed on count or value parity mismatches.
criteria.notes: Fault-injected conflicting and missing runtime state abort before the phase flip.

criteria.description: A mission flips to snapshot authority only after seed and verification succeed.
criteria.notes: Malformed authored data and verification failures leave meta.json unflipped.

criteria.description: Runtime reads and writes use the event-derived snapshot unconditionally.
criteria.notes: The complete eligible dogfood corpus is backfilled and verifies under unconditional snapshot reads.

criteria.description: The phase-1 snapshot-authority predicate and its public facade alias are deleted.
criteria.notes: The distinct legacy lane-mirror gate remains intact per C-004.

criteria.description: Review feedback and done evidence are reconstructed from event state without frontmatter fallback.
criteria.notes: Event-only review and completion paths are exercised by the consolidated status suite.

criteria.description: Former bypass consumers resolve evicted runtime fields through the canonical snapshot seam.
criteria.notes: Dashboard, task status, and WorkPackage consumers share the reconstructed view.

criteria.description: The #2093 invariant rejects every frontmatter runtime-authority read, including attribute access.
criteria.notes: The sanctioned-reader set is empty and both scalar and attribute-read mutations are detected.

criteria.description: The status test suite represents the single post-cutover authority model.
criteria.evidence: tests/status and tests/specify_cli/status full consolidated suite
criteria.notes: Legacy split expectations were replaced with unconditional snapshot and event-only assertions.

criteria.description: The upgrade migration is auto-discovered, idempotent, fresh-install safe, and fail-closed.
criteria.notes: The migration inventory ratchet was advanced with the registered runtime-state migration.

criteria.description: Inert WP metadata runtime fields and cosmetic field-order slots are removed.
criteria.notes: The optional reduction was completed; retained snapshot carrier fields and status_phase remain covered.

criteria.description: One canonical reader reconstructs dynamic WP state and keeps authored recommendations distinct.
criteria.notes: Coord topology reads planning metadata from primary and runtime state from the status partition.

criteria.description: Actual role, profile, profile version, model, and provider are event-recorded and reduce latest-wins.
criteria.notes: Resolved binding is never copied from authored frontmatter. Historical authored-derived seed rows were precisely removed by their deterministic resolved_binding seed IDs.

criteria.description: Dispatch-resolved model and profile data are threaded into implement, review, and reassignment claims.
criteria.notes: Bare claims persist explicit absence; supplied invocation identifiers fail closed when unresolved.

criteria.description: Resolved binding round-trips in structured transition actors and atomic annotations for SaaS fan-out.
criteria.notes: Local transition plus annotation persistence is atomic; optional first-class package fan-out remains version-gated.

criteria.description: Subtask completion is event-sourced and canonical task templates no longer emit checkbox rows.
criteria.notes: Authored roster discovery fails closed while completion comes only from snapshot subtasks.

criteria.description: Parity mismatches abort before phase flip with zero tolerated data loss.
criteria.notes: Both value conflict and missing-state fault injection leave meta.json byte-stable.

criteria.description: Backfill and upgrade migration reruns are deterministic no-ops.
criteria.notes: Deterministic seed IDs make the second run byte-stable.

criteria.description: Runtime transitions leave work-package Markdown byte-identical.
criteria.notes: Claim and off-axis annotation paths are both event-only.

criteria.description: The status and architectural gates add no new regressions or suppressions; changed Python is Ruff- and Mypy-clean.
criteria.evidence: 1243 status tests passed; 63 final architectural ratchet tests passed; all mission-owned findings from the broad and architectural runs passed focused reruns; Ruff passed; strict Mypy passed for all 37 changed Python files; tests/architectural/test_no_dead_symbols.py reports only specify_cli.core.env::SYNC_DISABLE_ENV_VARS
criteria.notes: No blanket suppression was added. The sole remaining dead-symbol failure is identically red at the mission baseline commit 77e1a2fa6c096909425c5920f23830e2ef778882; this record does not claim the entire architectural suite is green.

criteria.description: Upgrade verification failure aborts with an actionable mission-specific mismatch and no phase flip.
criteria.notes: The migration stops at the first invalid mission instead of partially flipping it.

criteria.description: Corpus backfill is a linear local filesystem pass with no network I/O.
criteria.notes: The implementation walks each mission once and uses only local event/frontmatter reads and writes.

criteria.description: Cutover order is backfill, fail-closed verify, phase flip, fallback deletion, then reduction.
criteria.notes: Snapshot evidence is proven before the legacy fallback is absent.

criteria.description: The production end state is unconditional; the phase-1 predicate is deleted.
criteria.notes: No runtime toggle remains for snapshot authority.

criteria.description: Migration writes resolve through the canonical mission directory and never the repository root.
criteria.notes: The library selector also rejects unsafe path segments before composition.

criteria.description: Frontmatter lane mirroring remains separately scoped and was not evicted by this mission.
criteria.notes: The legacy lane-mirror mechanism remains; a distinct follow-up is required for its removal.

criteria.description: No-data-loss claims are bounded to reduced count/value parity, not historical timestamp fidelity.
criteria.notes: Seed IDs are content-namespaced and clamped timestamps are not consumed as completion chronology.

criteria.description: The wired backfill symbols leave the deferred dead-symbol allowance without widening suppressions.
criteria.notes: Mission-owned symbols are live or unexported; the invariant sanctioned-reader set is empty. The unrelated baseline SYNC_DISABLE_ENV_VARS finding remains.

criteria.description: Resolved binding originates from dispatch/profile resolution, never copied authored frontmatter.
criteria.notes: Unavailable resolver fields use explicit absence sentinels rather than fabricated values.

criteria.description: Authored recommendations and resolved actuals remain distinctly labelled in the canonical WP view.
criteria.notes: An authored-only WP exposes an empty resolved group.

criteria.description: The field-authority decision is ratified in the ADR of record before the event vocabulary.
criteria.notes: The addendum defines authored intent and resolved binding as separate canonical authorities.

criteria.description: Historical checkbox completion was seeded before task-template checkbox removal.
criteria.notes: Migration keeps its legacy checkbox seed reader while runtime/template authorities no longer use checkboxes.

criteria.description: Historical authored assignment is never fabricated into resolved-actual seed events.
criteria.notes: Closeout precisely removed 1,154 deterministic fabricated rows across 185 missions; the regression forbids those namespaced seed IDs from returning without touching genuine runtime events.

criteria.description: Every eligible corpus mission verifies with zero parity mismatch before cutover.
criteria.notes: The committed dogfood corpus is non-vacuously populated and verifies.

criteria.description: The phase-1 authority predicate and facade export have zero source occurrences.
criteria.notes: The symbol and alias are deleted.

criteria.description: The #2093 invariant has an empty tolerated-reader set and mutation coverage.
criteria.notes: Both scalar and attribute-access frontmatter authority mutations are detected.

criteria.description: Runtime state transitions write zero bytes to WP Markdown.
criteria.notes: The unconditional event-only path is byte-stable.

criteria.description: Upgrade migration is idempotent, fresh-install safe, and fail-closed with actionable diagnostics.
criteria.notes: Auto-discovery, ordering, second-run no-op, fresh-install no-op, and failure abort are covered.

criteria.description: Mission-owned status, architecture, lint, and type gates introduce no new red.
criteria.evidence: 1243 status tests and 63 final architectural ratchet tests passed; Ruff and strict Mypy passed for all 37 changed Python source files
criteria.notes: The complete dead-symbol file retains only the exact mission-baseline SYNC_DISABLE_ENV_VARS failure; no blanket green claim is made.

criteria.description: Dashboard, task-status board, and WorkPackage share one reconstructed resolved state.
criteria.notes: Parity covers lane, agent, assignee, shell identity, subtasks, review, role, profile/version, model, and provider.

criteria.description: Implement then review claim reconstructs the latest actual while preserving authored intent and WP bytes.
criteria.notes: Review P2/M2 wins; authored P0/M0 stays separately labelled; never-claimed resolved actual stays empty.

criteria.description: The invariant flags dashboard-style attribute access and passes only after snapshot rerouting.
criteria.notes: The mutation guard is non-vacuous.

criteria.description: Subtask completion is snapshot-only; guards and templates no longer depend on checkbox rows.
criteria.notes: Guard block/unblock, fail-closed roster resolution, dashboard progress, checkbox absence, mark-status guidance, and generated surfaces are covered.

criteria.description: Resolved binding records the genuine dispatch model or explicit absence, never an authored fabrication.
criteria.notes: Invalid explicit binding inputs fail closed; unavailable optional fields clear prior values through explicit absence sentinels.
